name: Cranberry Drop Cookies
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Fresh or Frozen Cranberries, chopped
recipeInstructions: In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugars. Add the egg, milk, and lemon juice; mix well. Combine the dry ingredients separately and add them to the creamed mixture, mixing until just combined. Stir in the cranberries and walnuts. Drop heaping teaspoonfuls 2 inches apart onto greased baking sheets. Bake at 375°F for 13-15 minutes or until golden brown. Cool on wire racks. Yield: Approximately 5 dozen cookies.
